commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: I have no greater joy than to hear that my children walk in truth. Cornelius a Lapide Greater grace than these I have none. ) That Isaiah , nothing can be more grateful or pleasing to me than that they so act that I may hear they are walking in the truth that I have spoken of. Instead of Ï‡Î¬Î¶Î¹Î½, grace, some Greek MSS. read Ï‡Î¬Î¶Î±Î½, joy. This is followed by the Syriac. Jerome on the5th chapter to the Ephesians mentions that celebrated axiom of Christ, "Never be joyful except when ye shall see a brother in charity.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: No greater grace: that is nothing that gives me greater joy and satisfaction.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
